name: Param Rajesh Shah
desc:
I am a passionate developer focused on web and mobile application development. I work with modern frontend and backend technologies, including React, Flutter, JavaScript, React Native, AI, ML and Firebase. I enjoy building impactful solutions, especially in the fields of AI, healthcare, and fintech. As an active hackathon participant, I thrive in collaborative team environments and am committed to continuous learning, innovation, and creating technology that solves real-world problems.

Role: SE Mentee
Track: React Native
